title: Just Gunpowder
description: The mod adds sulphur, as well as the ability to make gunpowder
body:
![All Bloks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f31dd306fec0ba8ee0d723d1aa07e0174875fad1.png)


# **Just Gunpowder** 
> The mod is useful:
> 1. Smelting sulphur gives a lot of experience
> 2. Sulfur can replace coal as a fuel
> 3. Sulphur and gunpowder can be stored in blocks

# **Resources:**

![info7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d46d07949a7b5d382960fee0b594d3428a681b77.png)

- Sulfur spawns from 0 to 50 height. (50 - 0 Y)

![info8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4532fcfff136f72dc7b14879b3b4ca739d67af1a.png)

- Sulfur spawns from -63 to 1 height. (-63 - 1 Y)
